consumer_phase_refs.statement: if access_decision.decision in {DENY, REQUIRE_STEP_UP, REQUIRE_APPROVAL}: return ACCESS_BLOCKED_RESPONSE(reason=access_decision)
if access_decision.decision not in {ALLOW, ALLOW_MASKED}: return ERROR(INVALID_ACCESS_DECISION)
if `access_decision.decision = ALLOW_MASKED`, bind `masking_context` only to downstream render, export, and read-model projection steps

evaluation_phase_refs.statement: access_decision = AUTHORIZE(principal, tenant_id, client_id, period, raw_requested_scope, mode, run_kind)
